title: bidens clarendonensis
intro: Bidens clarendonensis, also known as Jamaican tea or tickseed, is a plant species belonging to the aster family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Bidens clarendonensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
